violations.text: At the time of inspection, the sliding door cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 49 degrees Fahrenheit (no TCS Foods at time of inspection). Unit is not to be used for storage of TCS foods until adjusted or repaired to properly maintain ambient and food temperatures at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the equipment (oven and refrigeration surfaces) were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

The floor and walls under and behind equipment in the kitchen area was observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

The ceiling in the front service/prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Proper surface characteristics of indoor areas were discussed with the PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2027

The non-food contact surfaces of the equipment (oven and refrigeration surfaces) were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2024

The floor and walls under and behind equipment in the kitchen area was observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024

The front prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. PIC stated they will contact a plumber to add a hand sink to the front prep area. Establishment to email inspector with proof of hand sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

The front prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. PIC stated they have plans to remodel the kitchen allowing for a handsink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

Meatballs were observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Meatballs have been in unit over night. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
Establishment is using time for Pizza without logs. PIC to email southern senior inpsector. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

The prep unit was observed not holding foods on the top right of the unit at an adequate ambient temperature. Unit to be serviced. Establishment to not use the side of the unit until serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
